title: HITMAN™ 2

notes:
The game runs very well, performances on par with Windows (it even runs better than the first Hitman's native Linux port).

One or two hiccups during the first 2 minutes (drops around 40 fps), then it was perfect.
title: HITMAN™ 2

notes:
Trying to run on Slackware 14.2
Had to use LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/usr/lib64/ in the launch options to get Proton/Wine to load libgnutls in steam runtime mode, otherwise the game will never be able to connect at all on startup. (Proton 3.16.6 seems to be compiled against libgnutls.so.30, but the current Steam runtime only has libgnutls.so.26)
However, the online connection is very unstable; after around 5-10 minutes the game will hang when trying to connect to the servers, this sometimes resolves itself after waiting for 5-10 minutes more, but this whole process makes the game unplayable.
title: HITMAN™ 2

notes:
Suffers from intense stutter all the time (every second or so, it 'hitches'). Vsync prevents the stutter from occurring in the menus, but has no effect on gameplay. 

Graphical settings don't affect the stutter, neither does 'simulation quality'. It's certainly playable and completable, but without any gunfire -- the moment the AI goes on alert, the stutter goes through the roof, making the game completely unplayable.

title: HITMAN™ 2

notes: After 3-5 minutes of shader caching (which causes the game to stutter), the game runs perfectly. The first time you play any mission location, your computer will need to cache the shader data, so expect a few minutes of stuttering. Afterwards, the game runs absolutely perfectly. No issues were encountered, and I've racked up over thirty hours since.

notes: I have read in previous contributions about mouse issues, menu issues, lighting issues and more. I have had no issues at all. And I play and full graphics with resolution of 1920x1080. So depending on your hardware the issue might not be proton but the limitations of your hardware, distro and/or drivers. Played over 20 hours already. No lag in any case, no crashes, mouse issues, etc..

title: HITMAN™ 2

notes: 1080p in a 3 monitor setup. Has significant stuttering during gameplay on first startup, but settles in as buttery smooth after roughly 20-30 minutes - note that this is only the very first time starting the game, consecutive play sessions do not suffer from this problem. Alt+Tab can result in losing mouse capturing in any window mode ("Window", "Fullscreen", "Exclusive Fullscreen") for a few minutes after tabbing back in. This fixes itself after a few minutes, but can be circumvented by toggling the setting to "Window" before tabbing out, then to "Exclusive Fullscreen" after tabbing back in.

title: HITMAN™ 2

notes: Went from platinum (40+ hours) to borked w/ the September 24th update (2.40.1). The game now exits after the launcher w/ error, "Failed to intialize DirectX. This game requires a DirectX 11-capable graphics card."
title: HITMAN™ 2

notes: Requires a workaround for now after Haven Island broke it =/ https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/issues/2121#issuecomment-534686823 Short answer: Replace amd_ags_x64.dll in HITMAN2/Retail folder with the one provided in the post by Skeevy420. Then create dxvk.conf in the same folder, and type [HITMAN2.exe] dxgi.customVendorId=10de into it, and save. Launch the game!
title: HITMAN™ 2

notes: Worked fine under 4.11-5 but new DXVK version seems borked, with Wine D3d11 the game start but crashes once mission loads.
title: HITMAN™ 2

notes:
You need to set some specific dxvk settings. 
Create dxvk.conf in ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/HITMAN2/Retail
And set the following settings.
####
dxgi.nvapiHack=False 
dxgi.customVendorId=10de 
####
Then the game launches as expected.
title: HITMAN™ 2

notes:
Issues after Sep 24th Update where game will not launch. 

Fix is to replace DLL with custom one and adding dxvk.conf file under HITMAN2/Retail. However mine worked perfectly just adding the .conf file without swapping out the DLL as described here: https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/issues/2121#issuecomment-534727345 so I would say try just with the config file first and then swap in the DLL if no luck.
title: HITMAN™ 2

notes: Runs great after replacing the amd_ags_x64.dll
